ranking_rationale: hardsigmoid=same worktree custom kernel, simple loop, includes in sfpu_split_includes and unary_op_utils, exact structural template; cbrt=uses sfpi::abs() directly (only worktree kernel to do so), same inner-loop pattern; silu=uses sfpu_reciprocal via sigmoid, multiply pattern x*f(x) matches softsign x*recip(1+|x|); sigmoid=core sub-expression 1+something then reciprocal is identical to softsign denominator pattern; hardtanh=same worktree wave, shows parameterized Converter::as_float bitcast pattern for init, simple per-element dst_reg loop
